lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Hello there. Want to travel to Slepe? I charge 10,000 coins for the journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Doesn't look like you have enough money. I charge 10,000 coins for the journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's Slepe?

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: It's a small village to the south of here. You can walk but the boat is safer and faster.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything to do there?

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: I guess that depends what interests you. The place is pretty quiet, though there's been rumours recently of a great evil making its home beneath the village.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: There's also Ver Sinhaza to the south, home to the Theatre of Blood. It's definitely worth having a look around, even if you don't intend to participate yourself.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: So, do you want to go to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is it so expensive?

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Not many people want to visit this part of the world so I have to keep the price high. If I didn't I wouldn't be able to keep my boat maintained.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: So, do you want to go to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give you 1,000,000 coins for permanent access.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: 1,000,000 coins! Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I don't have that sort of money.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Oh, I see. So, do you want to go to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. Here's 1,000,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Thank you so much. Now, do you want to go to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. That's too much for me to spend.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Oh, I see. So, do you want to go to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Hello there. Want to travel to Slepe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Hello there. Want to return to Port Phasmatys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything to do around here?

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Well you have Slepe just north of here. It's mostly a quiet place, though there's been rumours recently of a great evil making its home beneath the village.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: There's also Ver Sinhaza. You can find it south of here. There's a gap in the northern wall that you can get through.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's Ver Sinhaza?

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: It's a large vampyric castle, home to the Theatre of Blood. The vampyres claim that the Theatre is one of the greatest combat challenges around. Definitely worth a look even if you don't want to participate.

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Anyway, did you want to return to Port Phasmatys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

sections.title: Right-click Travel option or using the boat to travel

lines.speaker: Andras
lines.text: Doesn't look like you have enough money. I charge 10,000 coins for the journey.
